data.title: APT Satellite Reshapes Board as Yan Zhao Steps Down and China Satcom Executive Joins
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

APT Satellite Holdings ( (HK:1045) ) just unveiled an announcement.

APT Satellite Holdings has announced senior management and board changes, with executive director Yan Zhao resigning from the board and its remuneration and nomination committees from 25 March 2026 due to work adjustments, while remaining as a vice president. The reshuffle is positioned as an internal reallocation rather than a dispute-driven exit, with the company emphasizing that there is no disagreement between Yan and the board.

On the same date, the company appoints Lu Zheng as an executive director, vice president and member of both the remuneration and nomination committees, and as a director of key subsidiaries and controlling shareholder APT Satellite International. Lu, a senior executive at controlling shareholder China Satcom with deep experience in corporate culture, governance and listed company operations, is expected to strengthen alignment with the parent group and support standardized operations and high-quality development under a three-year service contract with performance-linked compensation.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1045) stock is a Buy with a HK$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on APT Satellite Holdings stock, see the HK:1045 Stock Forecast page.

More about APT Satellite Holdings

APT Satellite Holdings, incorporated in Bermuda and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the satellite communications sector through a group structure that includes several wholly owned subsidiaries. The company focuses on providing satellite capacity and related services to broadcasters, telecom operators and data customers across its regional markets, with control exerted by major shareholder China Satellite Communications Co., Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 14,292,048

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$2.74B

For an in-depth examination of 1045 stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Capital Industrial Financial Services Posts Stable 2025 Profit Amid Revenue Shift
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited ( (HK:0730) ) has provided an announcement.

Capital Industrial Financial Services Group Limited reported audited consolidated results for the year ended 31 December 2025, showing total revenue of HK$155.6 million, down from HK$191.6 million a year earlier, as sale-and-leaseback income fell sharply but was partially offset by strong growth in supply chain management and financial technology revenue. Despite the revenue decline and a larger fair value loss on investment properties, the group’s profit attributable to owners edged up to HK$29.3 million, supported by higher other income, a significant reversal of impairment losses on financial assets and controlled finance costs, indicating resilient profitability and a shifting business mix that leans more heavily on its expanding supply chain and fintech operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0730) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.12 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited stock, see the HK:0730 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shougang Concord Grand (Group) Limited

Capital Industrial Financial Services Group Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong that operates in financial services, focusing on sale-and-leaseback arrangements, supply chain management and financial technology solutions, alongside a smaller property leasing business. Its revenue streams are diversified across these segments, targeting clients that require structured financing, supply chain support and related fintech-enabled services.

YTD Price Performance: 15.83%

Average Trading Volume: 707,134

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$549.6M

Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings plc ( (GB:AML) ) has issued an update.

Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings has released its Annual Report and Accounts for the year ended 31 December 2025, alongside the Notice of its 2026 Annual General Meeting. The documents are now available on the company’s website and have been filed with the UK National Storage Mechanism, with hard copies sent to shareholders who opted for paper communications.

The automaker has also published its 2025 Sustainability Report, providing stakeholders with updated disclosures on its environmental, social, and governance performance. The coordinated publication of financial and sustainability reporting underlines Aston Martin’s efforts to enhance transparency for investors and reinforces its positioning as a listed luxury automotive group committed to formal ESG reporting standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:AML) stock is a Hold with a £36.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings plc stock, see the GB:AML Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AML Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AML is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing losses, high leverage/thin equity, and continued cash burn), reinforced by a strongly bearish technical setup (price far below key moving averages with negative MACD). Earnings-call guidance provides some offset via a clearer 2026 improvement plan, but near-term liquidity and execution risks remain significant, and valuation support is limited given losses and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on AML stock, click here.

The latest announcement is out from Drax Group plc ( (GB:DRX) ).

Drax Group has published its 2025 Annual Report and Accounts for the year ended 31 December 2025, along with the 2026 Notice of Annual General Meeting, on its website and via hard copy for shareholders who request it. These documents, together with related AGM materials including an amended Long Term Incentive Plan, have also been uploaded to the U.K. National Storage Mechanism for regulatory inspection.

The company’s 2026 AGM will be held on 30 April 2026 in London and via the Lumi electronic platform, reflecting an ongoing hybrid approach to shareholder engagement. Voting results from the meeting will be released through a regulatory information service and posted on the company’s website, reinforcing transparency and providing stakeholders with timely insight into governance decisions.

Valuation metrics are very favorable on the provided P/E and dividend yield, while the earnings call adds a positive tilt from reiterated multi-year free cash flow and shareholder returns, tempered by impairments and near-term earnings pressure under the new CfD regime.

data.title: Zhihu Publishes Unaudited 2025 Results and Cautions Investors on Reliance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zhihu, Inc. Class A ( (HK:2390) ) has shared an announcement.

Zhihu Inc. has released its unaudited condensed consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, prepared under U.S. Generally Accepted Accounting Principles rather than International Financial Reporting Standards. The disclosure, made to satisfy regulatory obligations in both Hong Kong and the U.S., signals transparency to its cross-listed investor base while the board cautions shareholders and potential investors against placing undue reliance on the figures and urges prudence when trading the company’s securities.

The announcement underscores the company’s status as an issuer subject to overlapping oversight by the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, the Securities and Futures Ordinance in Hong Kong, and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. By framing parts of the release as potential inside information and emphasizing regulatory safe-harbor protections, Zhihu highlights both the material nature of its latest performance data and the inherent uncertainties that could affect future outcomes and stakeholder risk assessments.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2390) stock is a Hold with a HK$10.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zhihu, Inc. Class A stock, see the HK:2390 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zhihu, Inc. Class A

Zhihu Inc. is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed in both New York and Hong Kong that operates an online knowledge-sharing platform, positioning itself within the broader internet and technology sector. The firm is controlled through weighted voting rights and is subject to dual regulatory regimes in the U.S. and Hong Kong, reflecting its focus on international capital markets and cross-border investor base.

Average Trading Volume: 122,041

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$1.93B

data.title: dynaCERT Taps New CEO to Drive Commercial Push in Asia and Latin America
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from dynaCERT ( (TSE:DYA) ) is now available.

dynaCERT has announced a planned leadership transition as it moves from a development-focused phase to global commercial expansion, elevating Chief Operating Officer Kevin Unrath to Chief Executive Officer while long-serving CEO Jim Payne shifts to the role of chairman. The move is designed to sharpen operational focus and execution, with Unrath’s operational background seen as critical to scaling deployments and converting the company’s growing commercial pipeline into revenue.

The company highlighted progress in key international markets, including Vietnam, where it has set up a service center agreement, trained local teams and launched pilot installations in trucking and port operations, and Mexico, where it is advancing market presence with a distribution partner and direct regional relationships. Supported by a $2 million loan to fund ongoing operations and commercialization, dynaCERT is concentrating on turning pilot projects in these regions into structured agreements and recurring revenue, leveraging its HydraGEN and HydraLytica technologies to tap rising demand for fuel-efficiency and emissions-reduction solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DYA) stock is a Sell with a C$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on dynaCERT stock, see the TSE:DYA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DYA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DYA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance (sharp revenue decline, negative gross profit, and significant cash burn), with leverage elevated despite improved equity. Technicals are still broadly bearish versus longer-term moving averages, and valuation support is limited by negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on DYA stock, click here.

More about dynaCERT

dynaCERT Inc. is a Canadian cleantech company based in Toronto that develops technologies to reduce fuel consumption and CO₂ emissions from internal combustion engines. The company manufactures and distributes its HydraGEN fuel-efficiency devices and the proprietary HydraLytica telematics platform, which captures fuel-use and emissions data that can underpin monetization of CO₂ savings in carbon-related markets.

Average Trading Volume: 143,504

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$53.37M

data.title: Foxtons Cancels Further Shares as Buyback Programme Progresses
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Foxtons ( (GB:FOXT) ).

Foxtons has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback and cancellation programme, repurchasing 50,000 ordinary shares on 24 March 2026 at an average price of about 43.61 pence per share through Singer Capital Markets. The shares will be cancelled, reducing the number of ordinary shares in issue to 319,624,464, with 25,432,259 held in treasury and total voting rights of 294,192,205, a change that may affect shareholder disclosure thresholds and signals ongoing capital management by the company.

The updated total voting rights figure will serve as the new reference point for investors assessing whether they must notify holdings under UK disclosure and transparency rules. By shrinking its free float and returning cash to shareholders via buybacks, Foxtons is reinforcing its current capital allocation strategy, which can support earnings per share and may influence investor perception of the group’s financial discipline and confidence in its future prospects.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FOXT) stock is a Buy with a £53.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Foxtons stock, see the GB:FOXT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FOXT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FOXT is a Neutral.

The score is supported by improving fundamentals (profitability since 2022, deleveraging, positive cash generation) and attractive valuation (low P/E with a dividend). These are partially offset by weak technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD) and earnings-call risks around sales underperformance, margin/cost pressure, and near-term working-capital headwinds despite positive 2026 growth guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on FOXT stock, click here.

More about Foxtons

Foxtons Group plc is a London-focused estate agency business operating in the UK residential property market. The company provides sales, lettings and related property services, targeting buyers, sellers, landlords and tenants across the capital and surrounding areas.

data.title: Kuaishou Moves to Upgrade Governance With New Articles of Association
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kuaishou Technology Class B ( (HK:1024) ) has provided an announcement.

Kuaishou Technology’s board has proposed adopting a new memorandum and articles of association to replace its existing constitutional documents, aiming to align with updated Hong Kong listing requirements and corporate governance standards. The changes are designed to incorporate core shareholder protection measures, including enabling virtual general meetings with electronic voting, updating the nomination committee’s terms of reference and making related housekeeping amendments to better match the Listing Rules and applicable laws.

The adoption of the new memorandum and articles will be put to shareholders as a special resolution at Kuaishou’s annual general meeting scheduled for June 25, 2026. If approved, the revised governance framework is expected to enhance shareholder participation, modernize the company’s corporate governance practices and potentially strengthen investor confidence in its compliance and oversight structures.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1024) stock is a Hold with a HK$78.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kuaishou Technology Class B stock, see the HK:1024 Stock Forecast page.

More about Kuaishou Technology Class B

Kuaishou Technology is a Chinese short-video and live-streaming platform operator, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong with dual HKD and RMB counters. The company serves a broad user base and advertisers through its social media and content-sharing ecosystem, competing in China’s highly contested online entertainment and digital advertising markets.

data.title: Dart Mining Uncovers High-Grade Rock Chips to Bolster Triumph Gold Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Dart Mining NL ( (AU:DTM) ) is now available.

Dart Mining NL has reported high-grade gold and silver results from rock chip sampling at its Triumph Gold Project in Central Queensland, particularly from the Chandlers and Sailor Boy lodes east of the Norton Mine and along strike of the Spotted Gum Mine in the Advance prospect area. These new results, which include assays up to 109 g/t gold and 105 g/t silver, highlight untested high-grade zones outside the current Mineral Resource Estimate and support Triumph’s potential beyond its existing 150,000-ounce inferred resource and substantial exploration target.

Reinterpretation of historic reverse circulation drilling combined with recent field reconnaissance at the Advance prospect has led Dart Mining to plan follow-up diamond drilling to better understand the complex geology and unlock additional ounces. The company sees Triumph as its flagship growth engine, with the newly identified high-grade zones and planned drilling expected to enhance resource expansion opportunities and strengthen its longer-term gold development pipeline, complementing work underway at the Coonambula joint venture.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:DTM) stock is a Hold with a A$0.03 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dart Mining NL stock, see the AU:DTM Stock Forecast page.

More about Dart Mining NL

Dart Mining NL is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on gold assets, with a flagship position at the Triumph Gold Project in Central Queensland. The company is advancing an existing JORC-compliant Inferred Mineral Resource and associated exploration targets at Triumph, while also progressing an earn-in and joint venture at the Coonambula gold-antimony project, aiming to grow its gold inventory and regional footprint.

Average Trading Volume: 994,620

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.71M
